heading_content_part: Privacy Policy: Ringtone Maker MP3 Cutter Privacy PolicyRingtone Maker MP3 Cutter Privacy Policy2016年7月22日星期五Ringtone Maker MP3 Cutter Privacy PolicyThis document clarifies how User data and any sensitive information is handled in the App.

Read and Write ContactsReading and writing contacts' information are needed so that you can customize the ringtone for each contact: Showing the ringtone of all contacts and Setting the ringtones of all contacts.
Write SettingsSet the default ringtone and notification sounds.
Record AudioRecord an audio so that you can set it as your ringtone or notification sound.
Read Internal/External storageReading all the audios in your device so that you can choose to edit.
Manage DocumentsChoose the audios or videos on your device so that you can choose to edit.
Write External StorageFor Saving the cut audios
unique device identifiers for advertising (Google Advertiser ID or IDFA, for example) and

Google Mobile Ads SDK is used to serve ads in the application. Please refer Google Privacy Policy in https://policies.google.com/privacyGoogle may use the advertising ID from your device to generate interests and demographics (for example, 'sports enthusiasts'). Interests, demographics, and other data may be used to serve better targeted ads to you. You can view and edit your interests and demographics, or opt out of personalized ads from https://www.google.com/settings/ads发帖者nekeybeicke时间：05:38通过电子邮件发送
